case_title: SCOTT, OLGA vs. ANGSUPUTIPHANT, APIRUK et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCOTT, OLGA AS TO DEFENDANT ANGSUPUTIPHANT, APIRUK AUNSUPUTIPHANT, APIRAK DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-13-1998 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-09-1998 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       FEB-23-1998
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR FEB-17-1998 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212
OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-20-1998, OFF CALENDAR DISMISSED 5/12

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-13-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO PAY SANCTIONS IMPOSED. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY CLAUDE A WYLE. HEARING SET FOR APR-22-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-22-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON APR-22-1998, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. TO PAY ALL SANCTIONS IMPOSED. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY CLAUDE A WYLE, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-07-1998 CONTINUED FROM APR-22-1998 TO MAY-20-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL COVER SHEET FILED BY PLTF.

PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-17-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON FEB-17-1998, SANCATION TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY CALUDE A WYLE, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-04-1998 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
